channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wardrobes dumped on communal walkway, 24th March
item.description:
Two wardrobes, sitting in the communal walkway near staircase, next to 78 Garnham Close for over a week. This was marked as being closed, but it is still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Callcott, 24th March
item.description:
Box dumped here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Callcott Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Faded signs, 24th March
item.description:
P1642

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Amesbury Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Most of the length of Brecknock Road, 24th March
item.description:
Road surface deterioration has progressed and is now causing damage to vehicles. Excessive wear and tear, potholes and rutting along the road is now only reasonably negotiable using four-wheel drive vehicles. Some holes have had a couple of shovels full of tarmac thrown into them which is wholly inadequate. I believe, in my opinion, the entire length of Brecknock Road should be overhauled/resurfaced to a professional standard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 95, Brecknock Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another damaged abandoned vehicle, 24th March
item.description:
Another vehicle has been left on this road - bad rear end damage. A local garage keeps abandoning vehicles in local streets. Please can something be done?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty alley, 24th March
item.description:
Swwep required of alley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Upper Park Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazardous abandoned vehicle, 24th March
item.description:
Vehicle in a bad state been there since last September. It’s clearly abandoned and very hazardous as the windows are smashed and glass is everywhere over the pavement and road. It’s been reported several times and the reports keep being closed - why? This vehicle needs to be moved. There’s now another abandoned vehicle nearby.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple tags, 24th March
item.description:
There is an alley running from Sherman rd to hawes rd I’ve not walked the entire length but from Sherman road it’s covered in tags. Full length might need checking
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherman Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple tags, 24th March
item.description:
From street light 2 down to street light 4 There are multiple tags along the buildings looks awful
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherman Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and flytipping, 24th March
item.description:
Previous request to clear up Faversham Road incorrectly marked as fixed. Litter in the form of bottles, cans, discarded fast food wrappers etc lining the pavements, street verges and street on Faversham Road. Also now a dumped piece of plywood leaning on the wall near the Mind shop. Please arrange for thorough clean/sweep.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 24th March
item.description:
Location: On Balliol Road, outside tyre shop, near to junction with Upper Wickham Lane. Mattress dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balliol Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 24th March
item.description:
Reported this morning. Marked as cleared. But it is still there!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Takeaway rubbish dumped in the street, 24th March
item.description:
High volume of litter outside the takeaway that mostly consists of takeaway boxes and wrapping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilton Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike blocking pavement, 24th March
item.description:
Bike in way of pedestrians on thus busy rout to and from station

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bike alarm won’t stop, 24th March
item.description:
A forest bike alarm has been going off all day.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access blocking, 24th March
item.description:
The 2 cars shown have been parked for over 2 weeks. The Toyota has no valid MOT. I believe cards are being bought at nearby autioneers and left here whilst being sold or repaired. These 2 are in addition to the blue mercedes previously reported for being repaired in a highway. Still parked here. These are blocking access and will cause an accident as this now down to 1 lane and sight restricted. Yellow lines or removal required.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glengall road, 24th March
item.description:
Street needs sweeping between kilburn high road and charteris road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights not working, 24th March
item.description:
On the garages between kirkham st and ravine grove 3 lights not working
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravine Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Table dumped by side of the road, 24th March
item.description:
Table dumped by side of the road late at night. Person seen on CCTV and is known and identifiable.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Occupation Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25 inker man road, 24th March
item.description:
Tree keeps blowing needs new watering bag re staking and a prune so it grows up straight this has been like this for a while now and is getting worse can you please sort it asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Inkerman Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
